chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1497 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 26.8.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Malik Altaf Hussain advocate for the respondent / KMC -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over three years ago. On the last date of hearing, learned counsel for the petitioner requested for adjournment and as such the matter was adjourned to today. The question of maintainability still remains outstanding. It is noted that in the last three years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
